words.def: a function of a topological space that gives, for any two points in the space, a value equal to the distance between them
words.zh: a. 公尺的, 公制的, 計量的

words.def: (criminal law) an act punishable by law; usually considered an evil act
words.zh: n. 犯罪, 罪行, 罪惡

words.def: an instance or single occasion for some event
words.zh: n. 時間, 時侯, 時機, 時期, 期限, 次數, 節拍, 暫停, 規定時間

words.def: a word or expression used for some particular thing
words.zh: n. 術語, 專有名詞, 期限, 學期, 任期, 條件, 價錢, 關係, 地位, 項, 界石

words.def: water frozen in the solid state
words.zh: n. 冰, 冰淇淋, 糖衣, 冷若冰霜, 矜持, 賄賂
